title: aster sandwicensis
intro: Aster sandwicensis, also known as Ma'o or Hawaiian Aster, is a perennial plant native to Hawaii and other Pacific islands, belonging to the daisy family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Aster sandwicensis include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In traditional Hawaiian medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, salve, or infused oil for topical application, and is also used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
